hooks.command: python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); ti=d.get('tool_input',{}); txt=(ti.get('new_string') or '')+(ti.get('content') or ''); bad=ti.get('file_path','').endswith('.spec.ts') and 'waitForTimeout' in txt; print('BLOCKED: page.waitForTimeout() is banned in tests. Use auto-waiting assertions (await expect(locator)...) or event-based waits instead. See tests/CLAUDE.md.', file=sys.stderr) if bad else None; sys.exit(2 if bad else 0)"

python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); print('[hook] ' + fp.split('/')[-1] + ' changed - run npx playwright test before committing.') if fp.endswith('.spec.ts') else None"
